citation.article_title: 3D slicer: A platform for subject-specific image analysis, visualization, and clinical support
citation.author: Kikinis

citation.author: Kirillov

citation.article_title: nnU-Net: A self-configuring method for deep learning-based biomedical image segmentation
citation.author: Isensee

citation.article_title: nnU-Net revisited: A call for rigorous validation in 3D medical image segmentation
citation.author: Isensee
citation.journal_title: International conference on medical image computing and computer-assisted intervention
citation.unstructured_citation: Isensee, F., Wald, T., Ulrich, C., Baumgartner, M., Roy, S., Maier-Hein, K., & Jaeger, P. F. (2024). nnU-Net revisited: A call for rigorous validation in 3D medical image segmentation. International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention, 488–498. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2404.09556
